description.en: Louisiana's Carnival-season icon: a cinnamon-swirled ring of sweet yeast dough, iced and dusted in purple, green and gold sugar, with a tiny plastic baby hidden inside. Eaten from Epiphany through Mardi Gras, finding the baby means you host next year's cake.
description.de: Louisianas Ikone der Karnevalssaison: ein zimtiger Ring aus süßem Hefeteig, glasiert und mit lila, grünem und goldenem Zucker bestreut, mit einem kleinen Plastikbaby im Teig versteckt. Gegessen von Epiphanias bis Mardi Gras – wer es findet, richtet den Kuchen nächstes Jahr aus.
description.es: El ícono de la temporada de Carnaval en Luisiana: un anillo de masa dulce de levadura con canela, glaseado y cubierto de azúcar morado, verde y dorado, con un pequeño bebé de plástico escondido dentro. Se come desde Epifanía hasta Mardi Gras.
description.fr: L'icône de la saison du Carnaval en Louisiane : un anneau de pâte levée sucrée à la cannelle, glacé et saupoudré de sucre violet, vert et or, avec un petit bébé en plastique caché à l'intérieur. Dégusté de l'Épiphanie à Mardi Gras.

origin.note: Descends from the French Catholic Epiphany treat galette des rois, carried to Louisiana by French colonists. Twentieth-century New Orleans bakeries recast it into today's cinnamon-and-icing Carnival ring, distinct from both galette des rois and brioche.

ingredients.note: packed light brown, for the filling
powdered sugar, whisked with milk into the icing
colored purple, green and gold, for dusting on top
traditional trinket tucked in from underneath after baking; inedible, optional

keeping.note: Best the day it's iced; the enriched dough dries faster than a lean loaf, though it holds a couple of days well wrapped.

method.title: Mix the dough
method.summary: Combine warm water, milk, yeast, sugar, butter, salt, nutmeg, eggs and flour into a soft, enriched dough; knead until smooth.

method.title: First rise
method.summary: Let the dough double in size in a warm place.

method.title: Fill
method.summary: Roll the dough into a long rectangle and spread it with melted butter, brown sugar and cinnamon.

method.title: Roll and twist
method.summary: Roll up tightly like a jelly roll, slice the log in half lengthwise, then twist the two halves together with the cut sides facing up.

method.title: Ring and proof
method.summary: Join the ends into a circle on a baking sheet and let it proof until puffy.

method.title: Bake
method.summary: Bake until golden brown and cooked through.

method.title: Decorate
method.summary: Once cool, drizzle with icing and dust bands of purple, green and gold sugar over the top; tuck the plastic baby in from underneath.

source.adaptation: Flour picked from source's 3–3½ cup range (used 3 cups) for typical hydration. Icing, decorative sugar and the baby figurine excluded from formula %s as post-bake additions.
